title: A Normal Life Please
original_title: フツーの仕事がしたい
overview: Workers employed under unacceptable conditions are increasing in Japan after the Japanese government's easing of labor regulations. This shocking documentary follows a truck driver and his fight for a normal life as he is threatened by a gang hired by his employers.

trailers.title: 「フツーの仕事がしたい」予告編

trailer_groups.title: 「フツーの仕事がしたい」予告編

ja.title: 「フツーの仕事がしたい」予告編
